name: EthGetTokenString
title: EthGetTokenString
syntax: long EthGetTokenString( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long bufferSize, char buffer[] );
description: The function copies characters from the token and adds a terminating "\0".

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: handle of a packet that has been created with EthInitPacket

return:
number of copied characters or 0
With EthGetLastError you can check if the function has been processed successfully.

description: Node System - PreStart in CAPL Browser
